title: Academic reporting structures
explanation:
Academic reporting structures

Report research and views formally without overusing said.

  • Smith (2020) argues that...
  • It has been widely acknowledged that...
  • The findings are consistent with the hypothesis that...

questions.text: Smith (2020) [*argues|tells|speaks] that urban design affects wellbeing.
It has been widely [*acknowledged|shouted|guessed] that inequality is rising.
The findings are [*consistent with|angry with|bored with] earlier studies.
The author [*contends|whispers|runs] that the law should be revised.
These results [*lend support to|borrow money from|run away from] the original hypothesis.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Previous research ____ that sleep deprivation impairs judgement. | *suggests | yells | dances
The data do not necessarily ____ a causal link. | *establish | celebrate | paint
Critics have ____ the methodology used in the study. | *questioned | sung | cooked
The paper ____ several limitations of the current model. | *identifies | hides | forgets
According [*to the latest review|with the latest review|on the latest review], the trend is accelerating.
The study [*draws attention to|draws pictures of|draws water from] gaps in existing policy.
It is [*widely held|narrowly held|never held] that education reduces poverty.
The evidence [*points to|points at the sky|points away from] structural causes.
The researchers [*attribute the decline to|attribute the decline with|attribute to decline] several factors.
